title: Key Art Paintings
description: Adds new paintings featuring key art from various Minecraft updates and releases.
body:
This mod adds a collection of new Minecraft paintings featuring key art from different Minecraft updates and promotional artwork.

![Overview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/55b3c2c24ae08fdc26d8c8fca38a8e19795a22cc.jpeg)

- You can place the paintings in the same way as vanilla paintings.
- This mod does not replace any existing paintings and is compatible with other painting mods.

Feel free to use this mod in your modpacks!

fan creation: not officially associated with the original creators
